items.name_en: White Suede Embroidered Checkered ·
items.name_cn:
White Suede Embroidered Checkered ·
CASSANDRE _Chain Bag A super practical small bag, Italian imported original sheepskin, full leather interior and exterior. Exquisite handcrafted with square check stitching, classic metal logo highlights individuality, flip-top design ensures security. Detachable shoulder strap, bag interior features ten card slots, one bill compartment, two dividers, one zippered pocket, fits everything!
Model: 743364
Size: 23x14x3cm
Strap Length: 47cm

items.name_en: White·
items.name_cn:
White·
LE 37 Bucket Bag Small_
Super cute bucket bag with handle_New style, made of Italian calfskin. The bag has a simple, structured silhouette that looks structured but not too sharp. It features metal studs at the bottom and a classic metal logo insert buckle. The overall look gives a unique blend of classic elegance and modern chic!
Size: 17×20×13cm
Model: 749036

items.name_en: White·
items.name_cn:
White·
SOLFERINO BOX_23cm
A best-seller that conquered the fashion world before it even launched. Inspired by the Parisian street Rue De Solferino, this bag features original patent Box calfskin with excellent texture and flexibility. The interior features a three-panel accordion pocket for daily essentials. The newly designed 'L' letter clasp opens vertically, completely redefining your perception of bag closures—simply too fun!
Model: 634305
Size: 23x16x6cm

items.name_en: YSL Calfskin WOC Small Envelope Bag. This is a must-have! Made from original factory grain calfskin, structured shape, comfortable to the touch. Removable shoulder strap allows it to be used as a clutch or evening bag. Multiple card slots, very practical. Take your phone and cards, and you're ready to go.

items.name_en: YSL Classic Legend Fashion Meets Romance❓ The original YSL leather texture embodies this attribute. It is hard to describe how charming it is; it has a magic that captivates you. It is a basic essential in many women's wardrobes, allowing you to create a simple yet textured look with plenty of accents💋Size: 30 Model 26821

items.name_en: YSL Liya Retro Duffel/Baguette Bag
items.name_cn:
YSL Liya Retro Duffel/Baguette Bag
This year I love this retro feel!
The latest LIYA bowling bag meets all large-capacity travel needs, excellent functionality! The size design suits sisters of different heights, embodying a lazy look for autumn and winter. Simple design with an adjustable strap, easy to match. Soft and delicate leather, combining style and practicality. Fashionable sisters don't miss out!
Size: 31x16x13cm
